title: US President Heights Analysis
desc: An ETL project analyzing heights of all US Presidents. Extracted from CSV, transformed with Pandas, and computed descriptive statistics.
highlights: Computed mean, median, min, max height

title: IDS Book: Chapter 2 Practice
desc: Hands-on practice — built real DataFrames, applied groupby, pivot tables, and lambda transforms.
highlights: Applied pivot tables for summary analysis

title: IDS Book: Chapter 3 Practice
desc: Applied descriptive statistics — data cleaning, histograms, CDFs, and PMFs.

title: Python Workbook: 100 Exercises
desc: Working through a curated Python workbook — from string manipulation to functions and file I/O.
